title: AN ACT CHANGING TO GENERAL ROXAS THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF DACUDAO IN THE CITY OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4711 / 53 OG No. 15, 4782 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1666, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING TO GENERAL ROXAS THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF DACUDAO IN THE CITY OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Dacudao in the City of Davao is hereby changed to General Roxas.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
